approvals.title: Approval Center
approvals.subtitle: Review and approve AI agent decisions

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to your Dealix AI platform

trustCheck.title: Evidence levels & anti-waste
trustCheck.subtitle: Before any external send: evidence ladder + Revenue OS anti-waste gate
trustCheck.hint: No external action without a Decision Passport and explicit human approval.

customerPortal.title: Customer portal (read-only)
customerPortal.subtitle: Delivery and proof status — customer-safe view

commandCenter.title: Founder Command Center
commandCenter.subtitle: Your next decision — not a dashboard to get lost in
commandCenter.revenuePending: No confirmed revenue yet — revenue is counted only after invoice_paid.
commandCenter.noBuildBody: Build a feature only if a manual workflow repeated 3 times, a customer explicitly asked, it cuts real risk, it speeds a paid delivery, or it opens a retainer. Otherwise: no build.
commandCenter.actionFirstFive: Pick your first 5 warm contacts and prepare messages (prepared_not_sent).
commandCenter.actionToMeeting: Convert a reply into a booked meeting.
commandCenter.actionToScope: Turn a used-in-meeting contact into a scope or intro request.
commandCenter.actionToInvoice: Issue an invoice for a scoped engagement.
commandCenter.actionResolveBlocked: Resolve {count} blocked item(s) on the Market Proof console.
commandCenter.actionHoldSteady: Keep the ledger current — classify every reply and silence.

marketProof.title: Market Proof Console
marketProof.subtitle: Prepare, record, classify — you send manually, the system never sends
marketProof.noSendNotice: No automatic send. You mark a message as manually sent only after you have sent it yourself.
marketProof.noContacts: No contacts yet. Record a prepared message below.

evidenceLedger.title: Evidence Ledger
evidenceLedger.subtitle: Read-only L2 to L7 trail — every transition with its evidence reference

boardDecision.title: Board Decision OS
boardDecision.subtitle: Decision support built from the market-proof ledger — figures, not estimates
boardDecision.revenueNote: Revenue is recognised only after invoice_paid (L7 confirmed).
boardDecision.buildBody: A manual workflow repeated 3+ times, or a customer explicitly asked, or it opens a retainer.
boardDecision.holdBody: Useful but not yet proven repeatable — keep delivering it manually and record the friction.
boardDecision.killBody: No evidence of demand, no risk reduction, no paid-delivery speed-up — do not build.

proofPack.title: Proof Pack Generator
proofPack.subtitle: Score a 14-section proof pack — governed, no external sends
proofPack.fillHint: Every section and component must carry evidence — any missing item is reported back.
